'''âz-z-p''' ('''kazazap''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:xylophone|xylophone]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-z-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xylophone|xylophone]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âz-z-p
|-
! Lemma
| kazazap
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizazap|thizazap]] || [[word:jizazap|jizazap]] || [[word:shizazap|shizazap]] || [[word:kizazap|kizazap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzazap|thuthuzazap]] || [[word:jujuzazap|jujuzazap]] || [[word:shushuzazap|shushuzazap]] || [[word:kukuzazap|kukuzazap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzazap|thuzazap]] || [[word:juzazap|juzazap]] || [[word:shuzazap|shuzazap]] || [[word:kuzazap|kuzazap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzazap|thuzazap]] || [[word:juzazap|juzazap]] || [[word:shuzazap|shuzazap]] || [[word:kuzazap|kuzazap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezazap|thezazap]] || [[word:jezazap|jezazap]] || [[word:shezazap|shezazap]] || [[word:kezazap|kezazap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozazap|thothozazap]] || [[word:jojozazap|jojozazap]] || [[word:shoshozazap|shoshozazap]] || [[word:kokozazap|kokozazap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozazap|thozazap]] || [[word:jozazap|jozazap]] || [[word:shozazap|shozazap]] || [[word:kozazap|kozazap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozazap|thozazap]] || [[word:jozazap|jozazap]] || [[word:shozazap|shozazap]] || [[word:kozazap|kozazap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠzazap|thĂŠzazap]] || [[word:jĂŠzazap|jĂŠzazap]] || [[word:shĂŠzazap|shĂŠzazap]] || [[word:kĂŠzazap|kĂŠzazap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazazap|thathazazap]] || [[word:jajazazap|jajazazap]] || [[word:shashazazap|shashazazap]] || [[word:kakazazap|kakazazap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazazap|thazazap]] || [[word:jazazap|jazazap]] || [[word:shazazap|shazazap]] || [[word:kazazap|kazazap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazazap|thazazap]] || [[word:jazazap|jazazap]] || [[word:shazazap|shazazap]] || [[word:kazazap|kazazap]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazazap|shazazap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazazap|goshazazap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazazap|gokishazazap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazazapnĂŒ|shazazapnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazazapnknĂŒ|goshazazapnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazazapnĂŒ|gokishazazapnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazazapshĂ«|shazazapshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazazapnkshĂ«|goshazazapnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazazapshĂ«|gokishazazapshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazazapro|shazazapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazazapnkro|goshazazapnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazazapro|gokishazazapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazazapmu|shazazapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazazapnkmu|goshazazapnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazazapmu|gokishazazapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazazapsher|shazazapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazazapnksher|goshazazapnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazazapsher|gokishazazapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazazapng|shazazapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazazapnkng|goshazazapnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazazapng|gokishazazapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazazapya|shazazapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazazapnkya|goshazazapnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazazapya|gokishazazapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazazapyam|shazazapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazazapnkyam|goshazazapnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazazapyam|gokishazazapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazazapnĂŒshĂ«|shazazapnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazazapnknĂŒshĂ«|goshazazapnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazazapnĂŒshĂ«|gokishazazapnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazazapnĂŒro|shazazapnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazazapnknĂŒro|goshazazapnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazazapnĂŒro|gokishazazapnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazazapnĂŒmu|shazazapnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazazapnknĂŒmu|goshazazapnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazazapnĂŒmu|gokishazazapnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazazapshĂ«nĂŒ|shazazapshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazazapnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshazazapnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazazapshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishazazapshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazazapshĂ«ro|shazazapshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazazapnkshĂ«ro|goshazazapnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazazapshĂ«ro|gokishazazapshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazazapshĂ«mu|shazazapshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazazapnkshĂ«mu|goshazazapnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazazapshĂ«mu|gokishazazapshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazazapronĂŒ|shazazapronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazazapnkronĂŒ|goshazazapnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazazapronĂŒ|gokishazazapronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazazaproshĂ«|shazazaproshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazazapnkroshĂ«|goshazazapnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazazaproshĂ«|gokishazazaproshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazazapromu|shazazapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazazapnkromu|goshazazapnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazazapromu|gokishazazapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazazapmunĂŒ|shazazapmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazazapnkmunĂŒ|goshazazapnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazazapmunĂŒ|gokishazazapmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazazapmushĂ«|shazazapmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazazapnkmushĂ«|goshazazapnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazazapmushĂ«|gokishazazapmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazazapmuro|shazazapmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazazapnkmuro|goshazazapnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazazapmuro|gokishazazapmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|91d6f4e}}
